title: Giuseppe — "G"
bodyText:
Late-30s human monk (Way of Tranquility), master of the Monk Guild / orphanage. Salt-and-pepper dreads, scar across his face, stoic. [[pc-felson|Felson]]'s guardian — and secretly his **godfather**. Portrait: art/g.jpg

# Current truth
- [[koviz]]-orphan alum. Adventured with **Yena & Roman** (Felson's parents). **[[gond]] spoke to them directly**: Lathandar had been captured; investigate an underground cult. They found the cult and **[[the-pool|the pool]]** — cultists dragged Roman in; Yena dove after; G kept his oath and raised Felson.
- Told Felson everything in S08, then trained him into **Way of Shadow** ("work in the dark, become shadow" — Roman's trick).
- Knows [[ms-judy]] ("crossed paths some time ago"). Knows more about the cult than he's said.

# Current state
**Sick and bedridden** (S16+). Organized the gate protest/riot distraction for the [[root-darkpass|Root]] operation (S19–20) from his sickbed network. His parting compass for the pool hunt: **"Follow the water down. Follow the heaviest stream."** (S23)

# Threads
[[thread-the-pool]] · [[gond]]
